item.title: Since learning this my garlic bread intake has gone up 3405%
item.description: Olive oil, salt and pepper, wrapped in baking paper and tin foil, baked for 15 minutes at 180c 1 bulb of garlic per 250g of butter Paprika, salt, pepper and parsley to mix into the butter I use a blender. thanks for most viral

item.title: Kovu the temporary Puckett
item.description:
Hi everyone, I'm MrPuckett You might've noticed a big ole new family member in some of my pictures
Everyone - meet Kovu! He's an 8 year old husky mix who's had a pretty great home most of his life
This year his family came across hard times and they were temporarily unable to care for him without a home Instead of surrendering the dog they love to a shelter, they signed up for crisis fostering
I normally crisis foster the little dogs, it's no secret that I love tiny scruffers like PJ But this guy had so much anxiety and so much energy, I figured with us running 2,000 miles a year we might be a good home for him
Kovu had a pretty tough first month with us, it was clear he hadn't been around other dogs most of his life Resource guarding, aggressive tendencies towards every dog he sees and all of a sudden he's in a strange house with 3 dogs and he didn't know why
And then...he had surgery. Most of the first month with Kovu he was on house arrest, unable to even go for a walk and get all of that energy and anxiety out It was the toughest month I've ever had fostering dogs.
The day that Kovu was cleared for exercise everything changed. I took him on his first 10k, which he easily crushed He then ran 40 miles with us the first week and never looked back!
We watched all that anxiety slowly melt away I saw him get closer and closer to my 3 dogs, no longer afraid or domineering
Kovu has now been with us for 3 months In the 2 months that he's been healthy he's ran 250 miles with me and my dogs He's happy in the home, he cuddles my dogs and he's really turned into a pretty incredible foster
Kovu is our 5th crisis foster in the last 6 months I love being a part of it, I love having a small role in families staying together and keeping dogs out of shelters... But it's also been incredibly stressful at times, especially not taking time off in-between dogs
Next week Kovu's mom moves into her own apartment and we'll reunite him with his family As much as I love the big goober, it's been a tough 3 months and I'm excited for him to be back with his mom
Yesterday we celebrated my dog's 18th birthday, I can't thank you enough for all the love on the post Each year for her birthday I do a project called Puckett Week where I try to support domestic violence survivors facing homelessness
Imgurians all over the world have been donating $18 for Nanna's 18th birthday to The Mary Parrish Center, we've raised $2,000 in 24 hours! They not only give abuse survivors their own safe apartment for a year, they also support them in every way possible to keep them safe and get families back on their feet
This is the most important thing I do every year and seeing so many of you helping is such an incredible feeling I can't even put it into words The Mary Parrish Center also set us up a wishlist where you can send household items directly to domestic violence survivors Imgurians have been picking through that for 24 hours it's amazing!
Taking care of 4 dogs is pretty tough work when one is special needs and one is a crisis foster, but I don't do it for any selfless reason I do it because the amount of love they collectively bring to my life is unmatched, I want to give them everything I failed to give Mr Puckett all those years we were homeless They make me want to be a better person, and for that I will always love them. ... To donate $18 to abuse survivors facing homelessness in honor of Nanna's 18th birthday - https://www.maryparrish.org/donate ... If you'd like to send supplies to the survivors of domestic violence at Mary Parrish - https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/3USHUHIVSINQE?ref_=wl_share ... Thank you for helping me celebrate my dog's birthday this week, it really means the world to me.
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: Youths

item.title: Some good news from Oz
item.description: https://www.abc.net.au/news/2024-02-21/rooftop-solar-cells-in-australia-to-outperform-demand/103489806 * In short: The capacity of rooftop solar will soon exceed that of coal, gas and hydro combined in Australia's main grid, a green energy report finds. * There is already almost 20GW of rooftop solar in Australia, but this is forecast to more than triple in coming decades. * What's next: The report's authors argue rooftop solar will play an outsized role in helping Australia meet its climate goals. The capacity of rooftop solar in Australia will eclipse the country's entire electricity demand in coming decades, according to a report that charts the technology's "staggering" rise. Almost 20 gigawatts of small-scale solar has already been installed across Australia's biggest electricity system, but a report from Green Energy Markets predicts this will more than triple by 2054, even by conservative assumptions. The firm said the rapid increase in the number of photovoltaic cells across the roofs of Australian homes and factories would be a key plank in government efforts to decarbonise the economy. In a report due out today authors Tristan Edis and Ric Brazzale say the capacity of rooftop solar will far overshadow the amount of large-scale conventional generation currently installed in the national electricity market (NEM). The national electricity market services about 10 million customers across Queensland, New South Wales, Victoria, South Australia and Tasmania. "These are staggering levels of capacity," the authors wrote. "They go well beyond the levels of installed capacity in the NEM we have now for coal, gas and hydro power plants combined of [about 41GW], and also well above typical historical daily averages in electricity demand." Solar a runaway freight train? According to Green Energy Markets, combined rooftop solar capacity will rise to 66GW over the next three decades, even under the most pessimistic scenario. In scenarios where governments took more aggressive action on carbon pricing and incentives for green technology, the forecast uptake would reach almost 100GW over the same period. By comparison, the total capacity of the NEM was about 55GW. "For many, such a large amount of rooftop solar capacity seems to stretch the boundaries of credibility," the authors said. "Why would we install more rooftop solar capacity than typical total electricity demand across not just residential customers, but every sector of the economy?" Despite the forecast surge in capacity, the report's authors qualified their conclusions by pointing out that solar panels only produced energy during daylight hours. Moreover, they said there was already so much rooftop solar in the system that it was driving spot electricity prices into negative territory – where generators pay to stay online – for significant amounts of time. But the authors argued that a number of things were driving and would continue to drive the take up of solar panels in Australia. For starters, they noted solar panels typically lasted up to 20 years, meaning their capacity steadily accumulated. On top of this, consumers were increasingly buying bigger systems, with the average installation rising from about two kilowatts in size in 2011 to eight kilowatts in 2023. Demand growth 'with a catch' The authors also said that falling prices for solar exports meant households faced little financial risk from "curtailment", which involves the market operator switching off their systems during periods of peak production. The authors said poles-and-wires companies had also demonstrated an ability to accommodate ever growing amounts of capacity despite warnings of "solar traffic jams". "Already five million Australians live in postcodes where 50 per cent or more of households have a solar system," they said. "Postcodes with a combined population of around 750,000 have 70 per cent of households or more with a solar system." Underpinning the forecasts was an expectation that batteries would become much cheaper. Green Energy Markets said the widespread adoption of batteries would enable the surge in rooftop solar capacity. It said this would allow customers to take better advantage of their own generation and help to keep the electricity stable. Green Energy Markets also predicted batteries prices would fall and said the mass-manufacture of the technology by the likes of car-makers would help drive down costs. "The key caveat to this finding, though, is that it is heavily contingent on an assumption that home battery storage systems will decline dramatically in price over the next decade and become a standard part of a new solar system install," the authors said.
item.dc:creator: WorldMillipede

item.title: Misogyny is a skill issue
item.description: Shamelessly stolen from a Facebook post by “The SJW that Nazis warned you about” so you guys don’t have to go there https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371%2Fjournal.pone.0131613 Edit: just a mini disclaimer to be faithful to the science. This is mainly a joke, the study only has a small sample size on a 7 year old game at the time so the conclusion doesn’t necessarily apply to the whole population (and it doesn’t claim to either). The paper would just be one piece of evidence in the whole pile of evidence needed to fully assert the claim. One would need to do a systematic literature review and find lots of studies on the subject to make a proper claim. Don’t take it too seriously Edit 2: updated the link to remove the fb shit at the end of the link
item.dc:creator: qwertdeep

item.title: The 407th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 36
item.description:
I'm running out of MeeMays again and I'm going to be cutting down to posting every other week for a while.
STAY TUNED! I'm running out of MeeMays again and I'm going to be cutting down posting frequency for a little while. I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild EVERY OTHER Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #SoundOn #Dump #Imgur15 #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Great mutant wolves that's all we need, thanks Russia!
item.description: Sauce, https://www.popularmechanics.com/science/animals/a46799706/mutant-wolves-of-chernobyl/ Hug you kids and loved ones. And for the love of all things vote ! Wow most viral cool! Send up doors or whatever. For those how are bitching that Chernobyl is in Ukraine is not Russia, the geo political climate of the time of the meltdown was under Russian government policy and Former President Gorbachev said that the Chernobyl accident was a more important factor in the fall of the Soviet Union than Perestroika – his program of liberal reform.

item.title: Something that needs to be said; Anything done half-assed is better than nothing.
item.description: I saw this on imgur, not sure when, I think it was like maybe a month or so ago? But it really resonated with me and it's something I needed to hear forever ago, maybe you guys need to hear it too. Edit** most viral! Thank you guys for this!
